item_name: Congrats for finishing all the quests!!
prompt:
A celebratory scene on a clean desk where the Completionist Award II trophy stands prominently in the center, freshly placed. Confetti or small paper stars are scattered lightly around it, and a soft glow or halo effect emphasizes the trophy’s importance. In the background, a computer or holographic display shows a stylized “all quests complete” progress ring or icon-only badge, avoiding any readable text while clearly signaling full completion.

Near-future solarpunk interior with warm, uplifting lighting and subtle greenery. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering with no brand logos or legible UI text; the focus is on the sense of accomplishment and the newly earned trophy. No full human figures are shown—at most a partial hand reaching toward the award.
